articles.title: How to use the new ChatGPT app integrations, including DoorDash, Spotify, Uber, and others - TechCrunch
articles.description: Learn how to use Spotify, Canva, Figma, Expedia, and other apps directly in ChatGPT.
articles.content: OpenAI offers app integrations in ChatGPT to allow you to connect your accounts directly to ChatGPT and ask the assistant to do things for you. For instance, with a Spotify integration, you can tell … [+8206 chars]
